prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年理科最低位次约3462→2825→5407，2024年较2023年明显前移（竞争加剧），2025年则大幅后移约2582名，波动较大；2025年基准约5407名；该校在新疆理科招生计划2023–2025年均为15人，2026年计划降至10人，缩招约33%，竞争压力显著增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜 排名从2021年第50名持续上升至2026年第43名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力获认可；学校声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第27位（较热）， 综合热度约171万，2023年曾进入高热榜第6位，短视频平台关注度较高，对报考热度有正向推动作用；控制科学与工程获评第五轮学科评估A级，为该校王牌学 科；船舶与海洋工程、水声工程等特色学科实力突出，与招生专业中的自动化类、海洋工程类、电子信息类高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自 动化等专业社会热度高热推荐，计算机类持续高热，与该校工科优势方向契合；新疆2026年高考总人数约23.8万人，较2025年（约7.65万）大幅增加，竞争加剧；该校位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，距新疆较远，属跨省招生；近年该校在新疆招生占比约0.3%–0.5%，属小规模招生省份，招生人数变化对位 次影响较为敏感。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年理科计划缩招33%的供需压力、学校排名持续上升的正面信号、抖音热度较高以及新疆考生总数大幅 增加等因素；在此基础上考虑学校声誉向好和考生竞争加剧，预测2026年理科最低位次约4226名，区间3726–4726名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science was approximately 3462 → 2825 → 5407. In 2024, the ranking moved significantly forward compared to 2023 (increased competition), while in 2025 it moved substantially backward by about 2582 places, showing large fluctuations; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 5407. The university's enrollment plan for Science in Xinjiang was 15 students each year from 2023 to 2025, but the 2026 plan is reduced to 10 students, a reduction of about 33%, significantly increasing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking on the Soft Science main list has steadily risen from 50th in 2021 to 43rd in 2026, showing continuous improvement in recent years, with growing recognition of the university's overall strength. The university's reputation is stable, with no significant negative public opinion. Its Douyin (TikTok) popularity ranks 27th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.71 million; in 2023, it entered the top 6 of the hot list, indicating high attention on short video platforms, which positively influences application enthusiasm. Control Science and Engineering was rated A-level in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, making it the university's flagship discipline. Specialized disciplines such as Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering and Underwater Acoustics Engineering are outstanding, closely related to the admission majors of Automation, Ocean Engineering, and Electronic Information.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended due to social popularity, and Computer Science remains consistently hot, aligning with the university's engineering strengths. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Xinjiang is approximately 238,000, a significant increase from about 76,500 in 2025, intensifying competition. The university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, far from Xinjiang, making it a cross-provincial enrollment. In recent years, the university's enrollment proportion in Xinjiang has been about 0.3%–0.5%, making it a small-scale enrollment province, where changes in enrollment numbers are more sensitive to ranking impacts.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward movement of the 2025 ranking, the 33% reduction in the 2026 Science enrollment plan, the positive signal of the university's rising ranking, high Douyin popularity, and the substantial increase in the total number of candidates in Xinjiang; additionally, taking into account the improving reputation of the university and intensified competition among candidates, the predicted minimum ranking for Science in 2026 is approximately 4226, with a range of 3726–4726.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Ocean Engineering (Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Ocean Robotics, etc.)
- Automation (Automation, Robotics Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
- Electronic Information (Underwater Acoustics Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Aerospace (Aircraft Design and Engineering, Aircraft Power Engineering, etc.)
- Software Engineering (National Special Software Innovation Class)
- Energy and Power (Energy and Power Engineering, Marine Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mechanical (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Industrial Design)
- Materials (Materials Science and Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Technology, etc.)
- Business Administration (admission conditions subject to university enrollment regulations)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range (3726–4726), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, with Tier 1 flagship majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<3726), you can focus on reaching for flagship majors such as Ocean Engineering and Automation. If your ranking is near the lower limit of the range (>4726), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors and strive to gain admission to the university.
